devmenu.unlockAll.confirmBody: Reveals all timeline epochs, ascension levels (A10), and compendium entries (cards, relics, potions, events, monsters, acts). This permanently modifies your save file.
devmenu.pseudocoop.title: Pseudo Co-op (Host)
devmenu.pseudocoop.desc: KitLib one-click host and run start. You play locally; AI drives simulated teammates in combat.
autoplay.enabled.desc: Rule-based bot drives your character (map, combat, rewards).
autoplay.mpWarn: Multiplayer host: AI Host drives your character; enable Host AI Teammate for remote combat.
autoplay.mpClientBlocked: AI Host is disabled on multiplayer clients. Enable Host AI Teammate on the host.
autoplay.mpHostBlocked: AI Host is disabled in multiplayer (local plays desync). Hand-play locally; Host AI Teammate is for phantom/offline peers only.
ai.status.devInactive: KitLib rail: inactive (enable Normal run on title screen)
ai.status.deferredUi: Sidebar: deferred until map opens (LAN / pseudo-coop)
ai.terminal.empty: No AI decisions yet this run.
ai.terminal.externalHint: Tail AI decisions in your system terminal ({0}). Full log: KitLib → Logs.
ai.terminal.externalHintNoFile: AI decisions are written to the session log. Open a system terminal to tail them live.
ai.terminal.noLog: No session log file found yet.
ai.terminal.launchFailed: Could not start a system terminal.
ai.rec.normalRun: Title screen → KitLib → set Normal run to Toolkit or Cheat Mode.
ai.rec.minimalRail: Dual-instance rail shows AI Host + Logs; use a full Dev run for all panels.
ai.rec.lanLocal: LAN: Neow and reward screens are automated locally; host still hand-plays combat.
ai.rec.lanLocalOff: Apply LAN host preset (AI Host panel) to auto-pick Neow and rewards on both windows.
ai.rec.deferUi: Finish Neow and open the map once — the sidebar attaches after deferred init.
ai.rec.noAutoplayMp: Turn off Solo AI Host in multiplayer; hand-play locally and use Host AI Teammate for remotes.
ai.rec.enableTeammate: Enable Host AI Teammate for phantom or connected peers.
ai.rec.driveEnet: Real client connected: enable AI Drives Live ENet Teammates + LAN preset.
ai.rec.syncbot: Solo host testing: enable SyncBot or spawn a phantom player.
ai.rec.clientAfk: Client: enable AFK so the host can enqueue your combat actions.
ai.rec.soloAutoplay: Solo run: enable AI Host below to automate map, combat, and rewards.
ai.rec.nonCombat: Companion {0}: spawn with EnableNonCombatAi for events, shop, and rewards.
ai.rec.ok: Current AI mode looks appropriate for this session.
ai.hud.telemetry.combat: HP {0}/{1} BLK {2} E {3} · IN {4} NET {5} ND {6} NXT {7} · JUNK {8} POLL {9} PLAY {10}/{11} SETUP {12}
ai.hud.enabled.desc: Show AI hosting status and sim telemetry at the top-left of the game screen.
syncbot.enabled.desc: Inject MpCheat ACKs and default remote choices on this machine (not real clients).
syncbot.autoEndTurn.desc: Ready-to-end-turn for non-local players in co-op combat
syncbot.phantom.desc: Experimental: add NetId 1001 on next host launch (1-player run only)
syncbot.hint: Does not replace ENet dual-instance tests or StateDivergence checks.
syncbot.hostOnly: SyncBot is host-only. Join as host or use a second client.
pseudocoop.afkClientOn: ● AFK on — host drives your combat
pseudocoop.afkClientOff: ○ AFK off — you play combat locally
pseudocoop.teammate.desc: SimpleStrategy plays combat for host-driven peers via action queue.
pseudocoop.driveLiveEnet.desc: Host enqueues combat for connected clients (requires client AFK mode).
pseudocoop.lanDriveHint: LAN: host hand-plays; AI enqueues combat for connected clients. Client must enable AFK mode and stay connected.
pseudocoop.lanHint: Phantom preset is for solo pseudo co-op only. When a real client is connected, use the LAN preset above.
pseudocoop.afkClient.desc: Block local combat input; host AI enqueues your actions. Do not click cards or end turn.
pseudocoop.afkClientHint: Host must use the LAN preset. Dual-instance: AFK is per-window. Host map votes mirror to you; in combat the host AI plays your character.
pseudocoop.teammateLiveWarn: Live ENet client connected: use the LAN preset or enable AI Drives Live ENet Teammates.
pseudocoop.autoPreset.desc: Apply preset when a host run starts.
pseudocoop.hint: Main menu Developer Mode → Pseudo Co-op (Host): options, character, and one-click start. Map/rewards: host only.
pseudocoop.autoplayConflict: Pseudo-coop: play locally yourself; disable AI Host or teammate AI.
mpcheat.optIn.hint: Enable Multiplayer Cheat in Toolkit menu to sync cheats in co-op (all players need KitLib).
mpcheat.host.active: Multiplayer cheat: host — player toggles are per-character; enemy toggles sync to all.
mpcheat.client.active: Multiplayer cheat: client — player toggles affect only your character; sync via host.
mpcheat.config.noNetId: No local net id for config sync.
mpcheat.cardAdd.blocked: Adding cards is disabled in multiplayer (not synced — causes desync).
mpcheat.cardAdd.hostOnly: Only the host can add cards in multiplayer.
mpcheat.cardAdd.clientTooltip: Adds to your character via host sync.
mpcheat.cardAdd.clientPending: Requesting host to sync add card…
mpcheat.cardAdd.clientSelfOnly: In multiplayer you can only add cards to your own character.
mpcheat.cardAdd.clientRequestTimeout: Host did not respond to add-card request in time.
mpcheat.cardRemove.clientTooltip: Removes from your character via host sync.
mpcheat.cardRemove.clientPending: Requesting host to sync remove card…
mpcheat.cardRemove.clientSelfOnly: In multiplayer you can only remove cards from your own character.
mpcheat.cardRemove.clientRequestTimeout: Host did not respond to remove-card request in time.
mpcheat.cardRemove.hostOnly: Only the host can remove cards in multiplayer.
mpcheat.cardRemove.libraryBlocked: Remove synced cards from a pile tab (Hand, Deck, etc.), not All Cards.
mpcheat.cardRemove.pending: Syncing remove card to all players…
mpcheat.cardRemove.pendingWithPeers: Syncing remove card… waiting for {0} player(s).
mpcheat.cardRemove.timeout: Remove card timed out waiting for other players.
mpcheat.cardRemove.timeoutDetail: Remove card timed out ({0}/{1} players confirmed).
mpcheat.cardEdit.clientTooltip: Edits your card via host sync.
mpcheat.cardEdit.clientPending: Requesting host to sync card edit…
mpcheat.cardEdit.clientSelfOnly: In multiplayer you can only edit cards on your own character.
mpcheat.cardEdit.clientRequestTimeout: Host did not respond to edit-card request in time.
mpcheat.cardEdit.hostOnly: Only the host can edit cards in multiplayer.
mpcheat.cardEdit.libraryBlocked: Edit synced cards from a pile tab (Hand, Deck, etc.), not All Cards.
mpcheat.cardEdit.timeout: Edit card timed out waiting for other players.
mpcheat.cardEdit.timeoutDetail: Edit card timed out ({0}/{1} players confirmed).
mpcheat.cardAdd.pending: Syncing add card to all players…
mpcheat.cardAdd.pendingWithPeers: Syncing add card… waiting for {0} player(s).
mpcheat.cardAdd.timeout: Add card timed out waiting for other players.
mpcheat.cardAdd.timeoutDetail: Add card timed out ({0}/{1} players confirmed).
mpcheat.cardAdd.tempOnly: Multiplayer: Temporary only — Permanent writes to the run deck; edited stats may desync in later combats.
mpcheat.cardAdd.permLocksEdits: Permanent mode: card stat edits are disabled.
mpcheat.cardAdd.permEditedHint: Multiplayer: switch to Temporary to edit stats before add.
mpcheat.cardAdd.permAllowedHint: Multiplayer: Permanent is allowed for unedited cards.
mpcheat.cardAdd.permanentEditedBlocked: Permanent add is disabled while card stats are edited — use Temporary or reset edits.
mpcheat.itemSync.hint: Relics, potions, and combat adds use host prepare/ACK/execute sync.
mpcheat.item.hostDirect: Use host controls to apply this cheat.
mpcheat.item.hostOnly: Only the host can apply this cheat in multiplayer.
mpcheat.item.clientSelfOnly: In multiplayer you can only change your own character for this action.
mpcheat.item.clientRequestTimeout: Host did not respond to item cheat request in time.
mpcheat.item.timeout: Timed out waiting for other players.
mpcheat.relicAdd.clientTooltip: Requests host to sync add relic to your character.
mpcheat.relicAdd.clientPending: Requesting host to sync add relic…
mpcheat.relicAdd.pending: Syncing add relic to all players…
mpcheat.relicAdd.pendingWithPeers: Syncing add relic… waiting for {0} player(s).
mpcheat.relicRemove.clientPending: Requesting host to sync remove relic…
mpcheat.potionAdd.clientTooltip: Requests host to sync add potion to your character.
mpcheat.potionAdd.clientPending: Requesting host to sync add potion…
mpcheat.potionRemove.clientPending: Requesting host to sync discard potion…
mpcheat.config.clientRequestTimeout: Host did not respond to config request in time.
mpcheat.config.hostOnly: Only the host can publish cheat config.
mpcheat.powerAdd.clientTooltip: Requests host to sync apply power to your character.
mpcheat.powerAdd.clientPending: Requesting host to sync apply power…
mpcheat.powerRemove.clientPending: Requesting host to sync remove power…
mpcheat.powerClear.clientPending: Requesting host to sync clear powers…
mpcheat.power.autoApply.mpDisabled: Auto-Apply is not synced in multiplayer.
mpcheat.hooks.railDisabled: Hooks are disabled in multiplayer (not synced).
settings.showHiddenCards.desc: Include dev-hidden cards in the KitLib card library
settings.gameContextPane.desc: Show the right combat sidebar during fights (stats, enemy intent, combat tools)
hotkeys.conflict.gameKey: That key conflicts with a game shortcut (the game matches the key only, not Ctrl/Shift/Alt).
hotkeys.conflict.devConsole: That key opens the official dev console.
settings.autoBackupProgress.desc: When the loaded mod set changes, copy progress.save before the game can write
settings.warnRemovedModProgress.desc: Log a warning if progress.save still references mods that are no longer loaded
settings.promptModCharacterProgressLoss: Prompt on mod character progress loss
On startup, offer to restore from backup when mod character stats were filtered on load
progressGuard.subtitle: Backs up progress.save when the loaded mod set changes, before vanilla save filtering can wipe mod unlocks.
progressGuard.status.title: Status
progressGuard.status.changed: Mod set changed since last launch
progressGuard.backups.title: Recent backups (profile {0})
progressGuard.restore.confirmBody: This replaces the active profile's progress.save and reloads progress in memory. An in-progress run is not affected.
progressGuard.restore.confirmWarnMods: Warning: the current mod set differs from when this backup was taken. Restore matching mods first or mod progress may be filtered again on load.
progressGuard.restore.blockedRun: Cannot restore progress while a run is in progress. Return to the main menu first.
progressGuard.lossPrompt.title: Mod character progress may have been lost
progressGuard.lossPrompt.body: Vanilla save loading may have filtered mod character stats that are still present in a recent backup.
progressGuard.detail.title: Backup details
progressGuard.detail.subtitle: {0} — profile {1}, {2}
snapshot.title: SAVE MANAGER

enemy.mapSelectHint: Click a combat node on the map to view or edit its encounter.
enemy.mapNonCombat: This node is not a combat room.
enemy.mapCurrentRoom: You are currently in this room.
enemy.mapNoEncounter: No encounter predicted for this node.
enemy.mapFloorOverride: Floor override is active for this node.
enemy.mapInheritedOverride: Using a run rule (no floor override).
enemy.currentCombatHint: Affects this fight only · not saved to run rules.
enemy.mapHint: Click combat nodes on the map to edit. Run rules apply to this run only.
enemy.runScopeHint: Active for this run only · cleared when the run ends.
enemy.mapVanillaEncounter: Using the act's default encounter pool.
enemy.combatSidebar.title: Combat
enemy.combatSidebar.hint: Add or remove enemies in the current fight.
cheat.unknownTreasure.desc: Unknown map nodes always give treasure
cheat.godMode.desc: Auto-heal to max HP every frame
cheat.extraDraw.desc: Draw extra cards at turn start
runtime.godMode.desc: Auto-heal to max HP every frame
runtime.extraDraw.desc: Draw extra cards at turn start
statLock.title: Stat Locks
cheat.mapDebugJump.desc: When enabled, click any node on the map to debug-jump. When disabled, vanilla path travel only.

potion.select.title: Select Potion
event.select.title: Select Event
console.title: Command Reference
console.copyHint: Click a command to copy to clipboard
preset.title: Preset Manager
preset.name: Preset name...
cardEdit.title: Card Editor
cardBrowser.editMpWarning: Multiplayer: edits below are local-only and may cause StateDivergence disconnects. Use synced add/remove for deck changes.
cardBrowser.editMpSync: Multiplayer: edits below sync to all players (use Hand/Deck tabs).
cardBrowser.editMpLibraryBlocked: Multiplayer: open Hand/Deck (or another pile tab) to sync edits. All Cards library is local-only.
cardBrowser.editMpLibrarySync: Multiplayer: edits below sync to all players when you add this card.
cardBrowser.editMpLibraryStaged: Staged for add — will sync to all players when you add this card.
cardBrowser.permLocksEdits: Card stat edits are disabled in Permanent mode.
cardBrowser.editMpEnchantLibrary: Enchantment below stages for add — syncs to all players when you add this card.

power.target.label: Target

room.nav.title: Room Teleport
room.noRun: No active run — start a run first.
room.desc.shop: Visit the merchant — buy and remove cards.
room.desc.rest: Rest or smith — recover HP or upgrade a card.
room.desc.treasure: Open a chest — gain a relic.
room.desc.ancients: Visit an Ancient — dialogue and blessings.

rail.title: Sidebar
rail.hint: Drag to reorder. Uncheck to hide a panel from the sidebar.
rail.modeLocked: Not available in the current run mode
combatStats.title: Combat Stats
combatStats.subtitle: Live combat statistics from CombatHistory. Updates during fights; last combat is kept after victory.
combatStats.empty: No combat data yet. Enter a fight to begin tracking.
combatStats.emptyHint: Tracking starts automatically when Toolkit is active and a combat begins.
combatStats.runHint: Combined stats for {0} combat(s) this run.
combatStats.runEmpty: No completed combats in this run yet.
combatStats.pie.title: Breakdown
combatStats.pie.hint.overview: Combat score by category: damage, block, debuffs, utility, etc.
combatStats.pie.hint.cards: Top cards by attributed contribution score.
combatStats.pie.hint.support: Block, utility, debuffs, buffs, potions, and synergy.
combatStats.monsterIntent.title: Enemy intents
combatStats.monsterIntent.uncertainHint: Estimated — enemy AI may branch randomly.
enemyIntent.title: Enemy intents
enemyIntent.subtitle: Click a turn in the intent chain, then pick a move to override that turn.
enemyIntent.overlay.title: Enemy intents
enemyIntent.uncertainHint: Estimated — enemy AI may branch randomly.
enemyIntent.sidebar.title: Next turn
enemyIntent.sidebar.hint: Predicted intent for the enemy turn after the one currently shown.
enemyIntent.edit.hint: Selected: turn {0}. Pick a move below to override that turn.
enemyIntent.edit.noMoves: No editable moves for this enemy.
enemyIntent.edit.moveNotFound: Move not found on this enemy.
combatStats.sidebar.playersHint: Bar height = total combat score. Colors = damage, block, setup, etc.
combatStats.timelineHint: Drag to select text and copy. Score: damage 1:1, block ×0.65, debuff 12/stack, buff 8/stack, utility 3+5×energy, vuln/weak bonus 1:1 on effective dmg.
hook.title: Hook Rules
hook.selectHint: Select a rule or create a new one
hook.name: Name
power.autoApply.title: Auto-Apply (Combat Start)
bridge.title: Framework bridge
bridge.subtitle: Runtime diagnostics: RitsuLib manifest, mod settings inventory, and process-wide Harmony.
bridge.section.ritsu.desc: Framework bootstrap, mod settings UI registry, and manifest constants from Const.
bridge.ritsu.name: Display name
bridge.ritsu.inventoryTitle: Page inventory (owning mod | page id | sections | sort | parent | title)
bridge.harmony.desc: Global Harmony state for this process — comparable to common mod-framework patch dumps.
bridge.harmony.summaryNote: Aggregate counts only here. Open the “Harmony analysis” panel for the full per-method report, or export patches to a file from your tooling.
bridge.hint: Read-only. Manual refresh or enable auto-refresh below.
harmony.title: Harmony patch analysis
harmony.subtitle: Smart analysis: browse by declaring type (left), detail + full text sub-tabs, owner pie on the right.
harmony.selectHint: Drag to select text in the report — Ctrl+C or “Copy selection”. Right-click for the context menu.
harmony.pie.title: Patch share by owner
harmony.registry.intro: Matched by Harmony owner id. Registry is embedded in KitLib.dll.
harmony.registry.noneMatched: No owners in this snapshot appear in the registry.
harmony.smart.heading: === Smart analysis (KitLib) ===
harmony.smart.riskIntro: These patterns often correlate with mod conflicts or fragile ordering — not proof. Use owner + patch method names to find the mod DLL.
harmony.smart.riskNone: No transpiler stacks, same-priority multi-owner rows, or heavy prefix/postfix stacks matched the thresholds.
harmony.smart.risk.transpiler: A) Multiple transpilers on one original method (high risk — IL rewrite order)
harmony.smart.risk.samePriority: B) Same hook kind + same priority + different owners (order vs other same-priority patches can be subtle)
harmony.smart.risk.heavy: C) Many prefixes/postfixes on one method (threshold: ≥{0} / ≥{1})
harmony.smart.riskHintFooter: If something breaks, try disabling mods whose owner id appears above, or compare load order.
harmony.smart.section.owners: Patches by owner (Harmony id) — most active first
harmony.smart.section.multi: Same method, multiple distinct owners — review for interactions
harmony.smart.noneMulti: No methods with 2+ distinct owners in this snapshot.
harmony.smart.disclaimer: Heuristics only: multi-owner does not imply a bug; it flags overlap worth eyeballing.
harmony.smart.selectTypeHint: Select a declaring type on the left to list mods and patches.
harmony.smart.typeStats: Patched methods: {0}  |  patch ops: {1}  |  distinct owners: {2}
harmony.filter.label: Exclude owners:
log.title: Log Viewer
log.instance.subtitle: This window · PID {0} · {1}
log.instance.dualHint: Dual-instance mode: this window writes to mod_data/KitLib/instances/{0}/session.log; Godot still shares user://logs/.
log.openFolderTip: Open the game log folder (user://logs/) in the system file manager
log.stats.title: Source Stats
script.title: SpireScratch Scripts
script.empty: No scripts found. Open the editor to create one.
manual.title: KitLib Manual
manual.subtitle: What each rail panel can do.
feedback.title: Mod Feedback / Bug Report
feedback.subtitle: Fill in a title and description, then export a ZIP package to share with any mod author. Includes filtered logs, loaded mod list, Harmony patches, and framework info.
feedback.field.title: Title (one-line summary)
feedback.contents.title: ZIP contents
feedback.contents.report: Title, description, OS info, KitLib version
feedback.contents.logs: In-memory log snapshot with noise suppressed
feedback.log.label: Attach game log file
feedback.privacy.label: Privacy mode
feedback.privacy.hint: Replaces your file system path with <user-data>
crashRecovery.settings.prompt: Prompt to export feedback on crash
crashRecovery.settings.prompt.desc: Show a dialog when an unhandled error occurs or the previous session exited abnormally
crashRecovery.startup.title: Previous session may have crashed
crashRecovery.startup.bodyOrphan: The game may have exited unexpectedly during your last session (PID {0}). Export a feedback ZIP to share logs with mod authors.
errorFeedback.prompt.title: Something went wrong
errorFeedback.prefill.orphanDetail: Previous session (PID {0}) did not shut down cleanly.
